reviews.comment:
Domingo 29 de junio, 13 hs, cargue combustible como todo socio. El playero, un total maleducado, no responde cuando se preguntaba algo, y al pedir llaves de baño, los mismos estaban cerrados, ¿?, previo indicar por señas (sin hablar) donde estaban colgadas. LA PRIMERA VEZ QUE ME SUCEDE EN UNA ESTACION YPF ACA.

(Translated by Google)
Sunday, June 29th, 1 PM, I filled up my tank like any other member. The attendant, incredibly rude, didn't answer my questions, and when I asked for the bathroom keys, they were locked, even though I gestured (without speaking) to where they were hanging. THIS IS THE FIRST TIME THIS HAS HAPPENED TO ME AT A YPF STATION HERE.

reviewReply.comment: Podrá brindarnos un número telefónico para comunicarnos con Ud?
